reason: 03-data-model: Thread.replacement_habit is a {cue, routine, reward, vow_text} loop — 'reward' is the habit-science term for what the old routine provided, not an engagement mechanic.
Habit-loop mapping UI (PLAN-02) names the loop's reward in the user's own words.
The series dare ladder instructs the user to DISABLE autoplay — the covenant's spirit, not a violation of it.
